settings.heading: Features
settings.content:
• Premium Quality: Crafted from high-grade aluminum for exceptional durability, lightness, and a refined appearance.
  • Anodized Finish: The anodized surface provides a rich, lasting color that’s resistant to scratches, corrosion, and fading.
  • Tempered Glass Design: Each diffuser features a unique design printed with UV technology on tempered glass, creating a striking, high-end aesthetic.
  • Powerful Magnet: Built-in strong magnet keeps the fragrance capsule securely in place, even on rough roads.
  • Protective Mount: Rubber-coated clip ensures a firm hold without scratching or damaging your car’s air vents.
  • Easy Refill System: Change fragrance capsules quickly and effortlessly — no tools required.
  • Universal Fit: Compatible with most vehicle vent types and designed to complement both sporty and luxury interiors.
  • Compact Size: Diameter 38 mm, thickness 14 mm — perfectly balanced for subtle elegance without obstructing airflow.

settings.heading: Desription
settings.content:
Experience luxury and innovation with our Premium Car Diffuser, crafted from anodized aluminum and tempered glass with UV-printed artwork.

Each diffuser is a unique piece of design, offering a refined, elegant look that enhances any car interior. The combination of a powerful magnet and a soft rubberized mount ensures perfect stability and protection for your vents.

More than just a diffuser- it’s a statement piece that blends style, quality, and functionality, keeping your car smelling fresh while elevating its overall aesthetic.

/* Didžiosios raidės Add to cart mygtuke */.product-form__submit {text-transform: uppercase !important; /* visos raidės didžiosios */}
